policy: Default-state component evidence is not production-ready state coverage. Native-quality promotion requires visible state, interaction, and accessibility coverage by component family; missing state evidence is tracked explicitly instead of inferred from default screenshots.

components.ownerFamily: Collections and templates; Navigation and workbench

Navigation and workbench; Text and forms

requirements.interactionRequirement: source-level open menu or flyout diagnostics; native popup visual evidence is not promoted
